name: db-migrate-tool
description: DEFERRED: Migration strategy not fully spec'd. Original: MCP tool for executing DDL from schema.
acceptanceCriteria: ArkType params schema: { schema: string, connection?: string, dialect?: 'postgres'|'sqlite' }
Loads schema from meta-store by name
Calls generateSQLIdempotent(schema, dialect) to get DDL statements
Executes each statement via BunSqlExecutor using named connection
Returns { ok: true, statementsExecuted: number, tables: string[] }
Returns { ok: false, error: {...} } on execution failure with partial results
Uses 'default' connection if connection param not specified
registerDbMigrate(server) follows existing tool registration pattern
Validates connection exists before attempting migration
